creator: vanilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
I got following error message with poudriere

---------
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===========================================================================
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/LICENSE
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/tlsdate
====>> Error: check-plist failures detected
build of sysutils/tlsdate ended at Tue Dec 23 10:37:09 CST 2014
build time: 00:00:20
!!! build failure encountered !!!
[00:00:27] ====>> Error: Build failed in phase: check-plist
[00:00:27] ====>> Cleaning up
[00:00:27] ====>> Umounting file systems
